side_effects.description: Stinging at injection site that lasted for days until finding suitable injection locations and using extra BAC water. Injection sites that work: lower back where butt meets it, inside of right thigh.

protocol_notes: Uses 50mg vials; pulls at least 10-20 units of BAC water per dose to reduce sting. Draws from a 50mg vial. Notes that everyone's body responds differently to injection sites.
